pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + Tight SWA + FA3 + Two-Phase TTT (val_bpb=1.1216)

output.summary: FA3 Hopper base with int6-quantized 11L+SWA model, then two-phase TTT (norm-only recalibration followed by selective last-block adaptation).
output.valOnlyReasoning: Both TTT phases adapt weights using only the validation shard after base training.
techniques: FA3 Hopper plus tight SWA for faster quantized steps
Norm-only recalibration phase for post-quantization statistics
Selective-freeze adaptation on last blocks during TTT
